ATL Region · Key Total = 200+ + 195

ATL Region Overview

Key inactive view: recovered/closed records are excluded. Total Key Inactive only counts 200+ (200 / 202 / 211 / 220 / 231 / 232) + 195 Linehaul Inac. 199 and 255 are kept as reference metrics on Overview only; 1910 is fully excluded from all report data. Upload or paste updated package numbers to remove records that already received new system updates.

Weekly Historical Analysis

Upload up to 7 inactive Excel snapshots. The dashboard will compare Total Key Inactive, 195, and 200+ by report date. Dates are inferred from the filename first, then from file modified time.

City Historical Trends

Daily Report Generator

Uses the currently loaded inactive Excel and your uploaded/pasted remove list. Report scope: ATL Region, 200+ status only, excluding 195 / 199 / 255 / 1910 and recovered/closed records.

Paste tracking numbers / order IDs that already updated after the inactive report was generated. One per line, or separated by spaces/commas.
